articles.title: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh secures Senate committee approval
articles.body: Banking panel votes in favour of Donald Trump’s candidate to lead US central bank

articles.title: Warsh can bring a much-needed trade-off on rates to the Fed
articles.body: The designate chair has signalled a willingness to take the central bank’s balance sheet into account when setting monetary policy

articles.title: How Jay Powell repelled Donald Trump’s attacks on the Federal Reserve
articles.body: Central bank chair’s decision to confront the president has bolstered the institution’s independence

articles.body: Resumption of £300mn in UK projects is a result of trade deal with US that aims to increase medicines spending
